title: Exponential Growth, Decay, and Logarithmic Scales
description: Model adoption, cooling, depreciation, and sound-level measurements. Learners cumulatively produce an exponential and logarithmic scenario lab through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Distinguish additive change from multiplicative growth and derive period factors.
Fit exponential growth and decay parameters with explicit initial conditions.
Use logarithms as inverses to solve for time, rate, or exponent.
